none.justification: Correctly flags that src/utils/list.c does not exist, gives the exact struct dl_list fields, and redirects to list.h. It includes all six inline functions plus the relevant initializer/accessor/iteration macros, satisfying the GT rubric for full credit.

ccodegraph.justification: Correctly states the premise error about the nonexistent list.c, gives the struct definition, and lists the complete set of inline functions and macros from list.h. The added tool-verification claims are not independently grade-relevant but do not conflict with the GT.

lsp.justification: Correctly identifies that there is no independent list.c and that all operations are in list.h, with the right struct fields and all six inline functions plus iteration/accessor macros. The extra clangd NULL diagnostic note is ancillary and does not reduce correctness.
